name: business-doc
description: Generate business documentation with guided requirements gathering

structured_questions.question: What problem are you solving or opportunity are you addressing?
structured_questions.placeholder: Describe the current situation and why it needs to change

structured_questions.question: Who are the key stakeholders?
structured_questions.placeholder: e.g., Executive Sponsor: Jane Doe (CTO), Users: Sales Team, Impacted: IT Operations

structured_questions.question: What type of business document do you need?
What is the timeline or deadline?
What does success look like? How will you measure it?
structured_questions.placeholder: e.g., 20% cost reduction, 95% user adoption, $500K revenue increase

questions.question: What is the quantified business impact? (Revenue, Cost savings, Efficiency gains, Risk reduction)
Describe the proposed solution or approach at a high level
What are the major phases or milestones?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Phase 1: Discovery (2 weeks), Phase 2: Design (4 weeks), Phase 3: Implementation (8 weeks)

questions.question: What resources are needed? (Team, budget, tools)
What is the budget or cost estimate?
What alternatives were considered? Why was this approach chosen?
What are the main risks or challenges?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Technical complexity, Resource availability, Stakeholder alignment
